title: 50 Packs Bread Bags to Keep Bread Fresh, Zippered Food Bag for Homemade Bread Loaf, Freezer Bread Storage Bag, Reusable Food Storage Bag
features: Safe & Food Grade Material – Thanks to our bread loaf cellophane bags' being food grade plastic, they are completely safe to use when storing your bread loaves, buns, muffins, bagels, and other baked goods
Practical Design: Each of our clear bakery bags measures 12x 10 inches when fully extended, Bottom gussets expand to accommodate large or irregular sized items
Lightweight, Strong & Durable： These bread loaf packing bags are made with premium-quality material for high moisture, freshness and odor barrier,sturdy and durable
Clear Plastic Bags: Great clarity plastic bread bag that you can clearly see the bread inside. You can spot right away if there’s an insect, bugs, or molds on the bread

Our bread poly bags are perfect for those who love to bake their own fresh and delicious bread loaves, buns, pastries, muffins, bagels, and more. Essential for bakeshop owners, bread enthusiast,home bakers and other food service industries
description: Product Description Product Information Bag Width: 32cm Bag Height:27cm Bottom: 11cm Pack Size: 50 Bags Sealing: Zipper Lock Bakery Toast Bags with Window for Homemade Bread Toast zipper bag Perfect for homemade baked bread! Best for toast, fruits, and veggies or just about anything. They will not rip or stretch as easily as the basic less expensive bread bags. Expandable bottom gusset making them the ideal size for storing large loaves of bread or multiple medium sized to small sized baked goods. Handle design Sealing Zipper Expandable Bottom Gusset
